twitter_thread: Buy 239 shares of a 6% yield stock like ExxonMobil and earn $3,000 in dividends annually.
To maximize returns, filter for stocks with a payout ratio below 60% and 5+ years of consistent payouts.
Avoid dividend traps like Kinder Morgan, which cut its payout by 75% in 2020.
Use Finviz to screen for top dividend stocks, filtering by yield, payout ratio, and dividend history.
Reinvesting dividends in a tax-efficient brokerage account can boost returns by 20% over 10 years.
Diversify your portfolio with 15 stocks across 5 sectors, like Johnson & Johnson, Procter & Gamble, and Coca-Cola.
What's your favorite high-yield dividend stock and why? #dividendinvesting #passiveincome
